DEPT. 501: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA AND FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION, SUBJECT TO SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFINGS. COURT GRANTS COUNSEL FOR BOTH SIDES LEAVE TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL PLEADINGS TO ARGUE THE APPLICABILITY OF NEW CASE LAW. PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IS DUE BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2014. DEFENDANT'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IS DUE BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON OCTOBER 10, 2014. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR RULING ON OCTOBER 14, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED. NO FURTHER ORAL ARGUMENT. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

AND FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE ALL ELEMENTS OF EACH OF THE 13 CAUSES OF ACTION; TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING TOLLING OF STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; AND TO ALLEGE TENDER OR EXCEPTION FROM TENDER RULE. James P. Downs, Esq. of Law Offices of Wallace C. Doolittle, (510-888-0604), for Joseph Chung, Plaintiff and opposing party.

No arguments were heard. Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, and FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND in part. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Oct-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
James P. Downs, Esq. of Wallace C. Doolittle Law Offices (510-888-0604), counsel for plaintiff/opposing party
Adrian L. Canzoneri, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP (415-659-4744), counsel for defendant/moving party party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Plaintiff submits and argues new case law, to wit "Alvarez v. Home Loan" without providing copies to opposing counsel. The parties are directed to meet and confer in the hallway regarding new case law. After meeting and conferring the parties return and the matter is argued further. Court rules now as follows:

DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA and FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission, subject to supplemental briefings. Court grants counsel for both sides leave to file supplemental pleadings to argue the applicability of new case law. Plaintiff's supplemental brief is due by close of business on September 29, 2014. Defendant's supplemental brief is due by close of business on October 10, 2014. The matter is continued for ruling on October 14, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501. No appearance required. There shall be no further argument.
